property.name: testRegisterUser
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should register a new user successfully

property.name: testLoginUser
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should login user with valid credentials

property.name: testLoginWithWrongUsernameOrPassword
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should fail login with invalid credentials

property.name: testCreateHospital
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should create hospital when role is HOSPITAL

property.name: testAddEquipment
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should add equipment to hospital

property.name: testScheduleMaintenance
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should schedule equipment maintenance

property.name: testPlaceOrder
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should place equipment order

property.name: testGetAllMaintenance
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should fetch all maintenance records for technician

property.name: testUpdateMaintenance
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should update maintenance status by technician

property.name: testGetAllOrders
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should fetch all orders for supplier

property.name: testUpdateOrderStatus
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should update order status by supplier

property.name: testTechnicianAndSupplierShouldNotAccessHospitalApi
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should restrict technician and supplier from hospital APIs

property.name: testHospitalAndSupplierShouldNotAccessTechnicianApi
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should restrict hospital and supplier from technician APIs

property.name: testHospitalAndTechnicianShouldNotAccessSupplierApi
property.value: MedicalEquipmentAndTrackingSystemApplicationTests should restrict hospital and technician from supplier APIs

property.name: CreatehospitalComponent should initialize itemForm with required fields
property.value: CreatehospitalComponent should initialize itemForm with required fields

property.name: CreatehospitalComponent should mark name field as invalid if empty
property.value: CreatehospitalComponent should mark name field as invalid if empty

property.name: CreatehospitalComponent should mark location field as invalid if empty
property.value: CreatehospitalComponent should mark location field as invalid if empty

property.name: HttpService should update order status
property.value: HttpService should update order status

property.name: HttpService should add equipment
property.value: HttpService should add equipment

property.name: HttpService should get orders
property.value: HttpService should fetch supplier orders

property.name: HttpService should get maintenance tasks
property.value: HttpService should fetch maintenance list

property.name: HttpService should get hospitals
property.value: HttpService should fetch hospitals

property.name: HttpService should update maintenance
property.value: HttpService should update maintenance

property.name: HttpService should order equipment
property.value: HttpService should place equipment order

property.name: HttpService should schedule maintenance
property.value: HttpService should schedule maintenance

property.name: HttpService should create hospital
property.value: HttpService should create hospital

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username and password are empty
property.value: LoginComponent should mark login form invalid when empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username or password is empty
property.value: LoginComponent should mark login form invalid when partially filled

property.name: LoginComponent should have valid form if username and password are provided
property.value: LoginComponent should validate login form when all fields are filled

property.name: MaintenanceComponent should initialize itemForm with required fields
property.value: MaintenanceComponent should initialize itemForm with required fields

property.name: MaintenanceComponent should mark scheduledDate field as invalid if empty
property.value: MaintenanceComponent should mark scheduledDate as required

property.name: MaintenanceComponent should mark completedDate field as invalid if empty
property.value: MaintenanceComponent should mark completedDate as required

property.name: MaintenanceComponent should mark description field as invalid if empty
property.value: MaintenanceComponent should mark description as required

property.name: MaintenanceComponent should mark status field as invalid if empty
property.value: MaintenanceComponent should mark status as required

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent should mark registration form invalid when empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if email is invalid
property.value: RegistrationComponent should mark email field invalid for incorrect email format

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly
property.value: RegistrationComponent should validate registration form when all fields are filled correctly

property.name: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should initialize itemForm with required fields
property.value: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should initialize itemForm with required fields

property.name: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should mark scheduledDate field as invalid if empty
property.value: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should mark scheduledDate as required

property.name: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should mark completedDate field as invalid if empty
property.value: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should mark completedDate as required

property.name: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should mark description field as invalid if empty
property.value: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should mark description as required

property.name: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should mark status field as invalid if empty
property.value: ScheduleMaintenanceComponent should mark status as required
